name: Donald L. Patterson Memorial
description: Donald L. Patterson Memorial is a place to play pickleball in Ironwood, MI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.
address: W Ridge St & North Hemlock Street

name: Pat O'Donnell Civic Center
description: Come play pickleball at Pat O'Donnell Civic Center in Ironwood, MI! There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and trainers or lessons.
fees: Fee required — $5 to play 1 hour. (Time is unlimited unless others are waiting to play).
hours: 7:30 – 4:00 p.m. Water Department Hours: 8:30 – 3:30 p.m. Memorial Building Offices & DPW Closed: New Years Day Good Friday Memorial Day Juneteenth Independence Day Labor Day Thanksgiving and the day after Thanksgiving Christmas Eve, Christmas Day New Years Eve Contact Contact Us (906) 932-5050 Ironwood Memorial Building 213 S.
